expectations.evidence: File written at the exact path with the '--pseudocode.md' suffix.

expectations.text: Has a Walkthrough section split into named Units (not a flat checklist)
expectations.evidence: Walkthrough section at L39 contains 6 named Units (schema, JSON, resolver, seed, model test, resolver test).

expectations.text: Every Unit has Purpose, Inputs/outputs, Pseudocode, and a Touch list
expectations.evidence: Each Unit (e.g. Unit 1 L41-75) has Purpose, Inputs/outputs, Pseudocode, and 'Touch list (live paths)' subsections.

expectations.text: Touch list paths exist in the ACE repo at run time
expectations.evidence: Agent's VERIFY report lists confirmed paths including models/RuntimeConfig.js, lib/ai/modelResolver.js, lib/persistence/dbStatus.js; only the four 'create' files don't exist yet by design.

expectations.text: Units reference models/PromptTemplate.js, lib/ai/promptResolver.js, config/prompts-default.json, scripts/seedPrompts.js, graph/prompts.js
expectations.evidence: All five files named across the six Units' touch lists.

expectations.text: Includes End-to-end sequence section tying Units together
expectations.evidence: 'End-to-end sequence' section at L377 walks through 7 numbered steps from schema landing to failure mode.

expectations.text: Pseudocode describes shape (LRU cache, resolver, fallback) without becoming a paste-ready implementation
expectations.evidence: Unit 3 pseudocode (L131-201) shows the cache shape, getTemplateDoc and compileTemplate signatures, and 'Shape notes' callouts explicitly marking non-paste-ready decisions.
'Final verification' section at L387-393 lists 5 checks including the ticket jest commands and a manual spot-check.
